name: claude-session-guardian
description: Monitor Claude Code's 5-hour rate limit window via background detector + reactor skill. Auto-detects zone upgrades (green/yellow/red/critical), invokes the react skill on each notification. At ≥90%, pauses subagents cooperatively, writes checkpoint, schedules automatic resume via CronCreate. Eliminates the per-turn token cost of the v1.0.x /loop polling design.
